bundles.name: Gel Pop
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A native cursor with soft liquid aura, droplet wake, and squishy grab energy.

bundles.name: Moonlight Focus
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A native cursor with a calm precision lens, subtle snap ring, and low-noise motion.

bundles.name: ODD Default
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A crisp native cursor with a small ODD aura, gel wake, and role-aware sparks.

bundles.name: Oddlings
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A native cursor surrounded by Oddling eye-dots, cyan gel motion, and mischievous pink sparks.

bundles.name: Paper Sparks
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A native cursor with risograph confetti, paper-dot wake, and pencil-pulse text energy.

bundles.name: Signal Bloom
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A native cursor with CRT ping rings, pixel wake, and radar-bright signal sparks.

bundles.name: Solar Orbit
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A native cursor with warm corona rings, comet wake, and bright wait/progress orbit.

bundles.name: Desk Pet Oddling
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A tiny Oddling that naps, watches the cursor, and reacts to Desktop Mode window activity.

bundles.name: Magic 8-Ball
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A WordPress-flavored magic 8-ball. Click to shake for wisdom.

bundles.name: Fortune Terminal
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A tiny CRT that prints WordPress omens, fake logs, and mysterious admin wisdom.

bundles.name: Plugin Panic Button
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A fake emergency button that turns plugin panic into an absurd calm-down ritual.

bundles.name: Spotify Embed
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Paste a Spotify playlist, album, track, artist, show, or episode URL and Spotify's official player lives on your desktop.

bundles.name: Sticky Note
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A tilted handwritten sticky note that auto-saves as you type.

bundles.name: Tiny Aquarium
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A calm little desktop aquarium with drifting fish, bubbles, and a gentle water shimmer.

bundles.name: Board
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Cards. Columns. Drag. Drop. Done. A no-nonsense project board that shows you exactly what's happening, what's stuck, and what you can finally move to "done."

bundles.name: Cache Invaders
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A neon arcade shooter where a purge cannon clears stale cache ghosts, CDN shields, CSS blobs, and one very stubborn browser cache.

bundles.name: Don't Read the Comments
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A crisp little Minesweeper-style puzzle where the dangerous squares reveal playful fake comment cards instead of explosions.

bundles.name: Flow
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Stop doomscrolling, start doing. A Pomodoro timer with ambient soundscapes, per-session task lists, and a heatmap so you can see exactly which days you crushed it.

bundles.name: 404 Runner
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: An endless runner where a missing page dashes through broken links, redirect rings, query rubble, and tiny uptime miracles.

bundles.name: Ledger
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Get paid. Track clients, generate polished invoices, and log payments without ever leaving WordPress.

bundles.name: Mosaic
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Tiny art, big feelings. A pixel editor with drawing tools, fills, undo/redo, and PNG export when you're ready to share your 32x32 masterpiece.

bundles.name: Plugin Panic
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A falling-block puzzle where plugin packages stack up, dependency conflicts loom, and every cleared line resolves one more update queue.

bundles.name: Sine
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A full synthesizer living inside your WordPress admin. Four waveforms, ADSR envelope, a resonant filter, and a step sequencer — all on pure Web Audio.

bundles.name: Swatch
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: Pick colors like you mean it. Full HSL editing, harmony rules, WCAG contrast checks, and one-click export to CSS, Tailwind, or SVG.

bundles.name: Tome
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
bundles.description: A fast internal wiki for your team. Write in markdown, organise into pages, find anything instantly.
